description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian dressed in urban attire, featuring a fitted vest over a collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves and tailored pants. She wears a utility belt with pouches and accessories, suggesting a practical or professional role, possibly security or law enforcement. Her posture is upright with arms extended horizontally, and her stance is balanced and alert. The figure has medium-length, wavy hair that falls just above the shoulders. Footwear appears to be sturdy, closed-toe shoes suitable for walking or standing for extended periods. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and appropriate for city environments.
description: An adult female pedestrian in a collared shirt, vest, tailored pants, and utility belt, with medium-length wavy hair and sturdy shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, vest, utility belt, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the thickness of the hair, and the side of the utility belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, pants, and the full length of the hair, as well as the back of the utility belt.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the right side of the utility belt and pants.
attribute_clothing_type: collared shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted vest, tailored pants, utility belt with pouches
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
